items.text: 现在我们已经对 Sequencer 有了一定的了解，并勾勒出了我们的场景。 So now we've learned a little bit about Sequencer and we've blocked out our scene. 现在，让我们开始创建一些我们看到的高质量几何细节 Now let's start creating some of the high quality geometry detail that we're seeing 在墙壁和地板上使用位移纹理。 on the walls and the floor by using displacement textures. 因此，我将使用一个平面，把它拖到左侧，这样就不会干扰到我了 So I'm going to take a floor plane and just drag it off to the left here so I don't interfere 隧道内的任何东西。 with anything inside of our tunnel. 不过，现在我们要使用 Quixel 中的建模工具来创建一些高分辨率的位移效果。 But now we're going to use the modeling tools in Quixel to create some high resolution displacement 我们在隧道中看到的岩石地面和细致的墙壁就是用几何图形制作的。 geometry to create the rocky floors and detailed walls that we saw in our tunnel. 因此，我要进入我们的 assets 文件夹，创建一个名为 cave 的全新文件夹。 So I'm going to go to our assets folder here and create a brand new folder called cave 墙壁和洞穴地面。 walls and cave ground. 让我们从地面开始。 And let's start with our ground. 因此，我要在场景中新建一个矩形。 So I'm going to create a new rectangle in our scene. 在我们的平面上很难看到这一点，但让我们点击任意位置 This will be a little bit hard to see on top of our floor plane, but let's click anywhere 因此，大多数 Quixel 纹理都是以两米乘两米的分辨率扫描的。 So most Quixel textures are scanned at a two meter by two meter resolution. 将宽度和深度改为 200 和 200，然后按接受。 So let's change our width and depth to 200 and 200 and press accept. 现在，让我们把它拖到地板平面上方，然后找到一个 Quixel 纹理，我们可以 Now let's drag this up above our floor plane and let's find a Quixel texture that we can 用于我们的地面。 use for our ground. 我将右键单击此处，点击添加 Quixel 内容，然后键入砖块和 I'm going to right click here and hit add Quixel content and let's type in brick and 去表面，我要选择历史。 go to surfaces and I'm going to choose historical. 因此，尝试一下总是不错的。 So it's always nice to try a couple out. 因此，我要下载罗马石墙、堡垒石墙，并下载 So I'm going to download the Roman stone wall, the fort stone wall, and I'm going to download 罗马砖地面。 the Roman brick floor. 我将用这块罗马砖地板进行第一次测试。 And I'm going to use this Roman brick floor for our first test here. 因此，我只需点击并拖动这个材质，将其应用到我们的地板平面上。 So I'm just going to click and drag this material and apply it to our floor plane. 因此，有了这样一个物体，我们就可以进入这里，并可以调节我们的正常力量 So with an object like this, we can go inside here and we could crank our normal strength 要非常非常高。 to something really, really high. 因此，让我们将其设置为 5，我们可以看到地面的对比度很高，但是 So let's set it to five and we can see we get a lot of contrast out of our ground, but 越靠近它，我们很快就会发现它其实只是一个平面，上面有一个 the closer we get to it, we can quickly see that it really is just a flat plane with a 上面的纹理。 texture on top of it. 因此，我们可以使用建模功能快速将该平面转化为高分辨率几何图形。 So we can turn this plane into high resolution geometry pretty quickly using the modeling 因此，我们有了底色、法线贴图和 ORD 贴图。 So we have our base color, our normal map, and we have this ORD map. 因此，这代表闭塞、粗糙度和位移。 So this stands for occlusion, roughness, and displacement. 因此，这些信号都包含在 R、G 和 B 频道中。 So these are packed into the R, G, and B channels. 因此，如果我取消选中 G 和 B，我们就能看到红色通道，也就是我们的遮挡部分。 So if I uncheck G and B, we'll be seeing our red channel, which is our occlusion of the ORD 地图。 ORD map. 这就是环境闭塞。 So this is ambient occlusion. 绿色通道是我们的粗糙度图。 The green channel is our roughness map. 因此，这将被插入材料的粗糙度通道。 So this is plugged into the roughness channel of the material. 蓝色通道是位移。 And the blue channel is the displacement. 这是一个数据图，我们可以用它来变形我们的几何体。 And this is a data map, which we can use to deform our geometry. 任何高于 0.5 的值都会推高到我们的平面之上，而任何低于 0.5 的值都会 And any value that's above 0.5 will push up above our plane and anything below 0.5 will 如果要对几何图形进行置换，我们希望尽可能使用最高质量的几何图形。 And if we're going to displace our geometry, we want to use the highest quality possible. 因此，在这种情况下，我要下载该纹理的高质量 4K 版本。 So in this case, I'm going to download the high quality 4K version of this texture. 现在，如果我进入线框模式，我们就能看到平面上的所有多边形。 So right now, if I go to wireframe mode, we'll see all of the polygons in our plane. 因为这是一个基元，所以一开始只有两个多边形。 And because this is a primitive, it only starts with two polygons. 因此，我们没有足够的分辨率来进行上下位移。 So we don't have nearly enough resolution to displace up or down. 因此，让我们向下滚动，选择 remesh。 So let's scroll down here and select remesh. 这样，我们就可以给它一个目标三角形数，告诉它我们的分辨率是多少 And this way we can give it a target triangle count to tell it exactly what resolution we 现在，我们将使用极高的分辨率来获取初始位移，然后我们将 Now we're going to go extremely high resolution to get an initial displacement, and then we'll 一旦我们满意了，就将网格简化。 simplify the mesh down once we're happy with it. 因此，我们要把三角形的数量设置得很高，比如 1，而不是 5000 个。 So instead of 5,000 triangles, we're going to set this to something very high, like 1 计算需要一些时间，现在按接受键吧。 Now this will take some time to calculate, but now let's press accept. 现在，当我们回到点亮视图时，它看起来不会有任何不同，但现在它是 Now when we go back to lit view, it's not going to look any different, but now it's 这样我们就可以添加位移了。 prepped so that we can add our displacement. 现在，让我们转到变形选项卡，选择位移。 So now let's go to the deform tab and select displace. 默认情况下，它给出的是佩林噪声位移，我们可以在这里看到 3D 效果。 Now by default, it's giving us a Perlin noise displacement, which we can see in 3D here. 但我们想给它一个图像纹理，所以让我们选择纹理 2D 贴图。 But we want to give it an image texture, so let's select texture 2D map. 现在，让我们把 ORD 地图拖到位移地图槽中。 Now let's drag our ORD map into the displacement map slot. 选择蓝色通道，也就是我们的位移通道。 And let's select the blue channel, which is our displacement channel. 现在你可以看到，如果我们仔细观察，就会发现我们的 And now you can see if we look up close, we have some really nice displacement of our 这里的几何图形。 geometry here. 根据不同的网格，您可能需要增加位移强度。 Now depending on the mesh, you might want to increase this displacement intensity. 所以现在，我要把它设置得很高，因为我们可以随时调整它的大小 So for now, I'm going to set it to something pretty high because we can always scale this 后来在 Z 中缩小了网格。 mesh down in Z later on. 现在我们可以看到线框模式，甚至看不到线框，因为有 So now we can see the wireframe mode and now we don't even see a wireframe because there's 我们的场景中有这么多几何图形。 so much geometry in our scene. 现在，假设我们可以将其转换为纳米石，从而保持原样。 Now hypothetically, we could keep this as is by just converting this to Nanite. 因此，您可以通过打开静态网格编辑器并启用 Nanite So the way you do that is either by opening the static mesh editor and enabling Nanite 支持或在任何静态网格下，都可以右键单击它并在此网格上启用 Nanite。 support or under any static mesh, you can right click it and enable Nanite on this mesh. 但即便如此，这也是极高的分辨率，超出了我们的需要。 But even so, this is extremely high resolution and beyond anything that we'd ever need. 因此，让我们转到网格操作，然后按 "简化 "键。 So let's go over to our mesh ops and press simplify. 现在，由于这个平面上有大量的多边形，我们可以改变我们的 And now because we have such a huge amount of polygons on this plane, we can change our 目标百分比要相当低，比如 20%。 target percentage to something fairly low, like 20. 计算完成后，我们可以近距离观察简化后的分辨率。 So now that that's done calculating, we can look up close what the resolution of our simplified 我想说的是，即使对于 Nanite 来说，这也是相当高的。 And I would say for what this is, this is still fairly high, even for Nanite. 所以我要把这个比例降到 15%。 So I'm going to drop this down to 15%. 在这里，我们可以选择几种不同的简化器类型。 And we have a couple of different simplifier types that we can select from here. 我们可以看到 QEM 模式是最快的，但我们想切换到 UE 标准、 And we can see that QEM mode is their fastest, but we want to switch over to UE standard, 这是他们拥有的最高质量的还原方法。 which is the highest quality reduction method that they have. 现在我们接受这个事实。 And now we'll accept that. 现在，我们有了高质量的流离网格，可以将其放入场景中了。 And now we have our high quality displaced mesh that we can put into our scene. 因此，请务必保存，并将其重命名为 SM 下划线罗马砖地板 So let's just make sure to save that and let's rename it to SM underscore Roman brick floor 我之所以喜欢在看起来正确的基础上增加一些排量，是为了让你 And why I like to increase the amount of displacement a bit beyond what looks correct is so you 可以将这样的网格与其他表面相交，如其他地面 could take a mesh like this and intersect it with other surfaces, like other ground 飞机或水材料。 planes or water materials. 这样，两个表面之间就会有很自然的交点。 And you'll get this nice natural intersection between the two surfaces. 否则，我们只需按 Z 缩放，减少位移量即可。 Otherwise, we can just scale it down by Z and just decrease the amount of displacement. 现在，当你将两者进行比较时，看看我们之间的差距有多大。 And now when you compare the two, look at how dramatic the difference is between our 3D 置换版本和原始 2D 纹理。 3D displacement version and the original 2D texture.
